summary: Music video set to a sung rendition of 'Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas.' It cuts between mid-century holiday cartoons (Rudolph, Frosty the Snowman), black-and-white footage of a man raising a U.S. flag, and sepia-toned footage of a family Christmas around a tree. It ends on the Department of Labor seal. The caption 'MERRY CHRISTMAS, AMERICA' appears over several shots.

script.scene: Stop-motion Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer (his red nose glowing) in soft purple-lit set; white serif caption 'MERRY CHRISTMAS, AMERICA' over the image; soft vocal 'Have yourself a merry little Christmas.'
Animated Frosty the Snowman with green top hat and pink flower, corncob pipe; same 'MERRY CHRISTMAS, AMERICA' caption; the holiday song continues.
Black-and-white footage of a man climbing to raise an American flag against a gray sky; caption persists.
Faded sepia archival film of an elderly man in a suit beside a decorated Christmas tree handing a gift to children gathered at his knees.
Cut to black with the white Department of Labor / United States of America seal centered; song resolves.

notable_text: Department of Labor / United States of America (seal)
